title: Tick Control in Fordham, Bronx | $125–$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Fordham, Bronx. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Free inspection. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Fordham, with its mix of residential neighborhoods, Fordham University's green campus, and proximity to the Bronx Zoo and New York Botanical Garden, provides ideal habitats for ticks to thrive. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick control services to protect Fordham families, students, and pets from tick-borne diseases like Lyme disease. Our targeted treatments eliminate ticks from your yard, garden, and property perimeter.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Fordham and the Bronx with eco-friendly tick control solutions that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand the unique landscape of Fordham—from the tree-lined streets near Arthur Avenue to the residential areas surrounding Fordham Road—and customize treatments to ensure maximum protection and long-lasting results.
localContext: Fordham's proximity to expansive green spaces like the New York Botanical Garden and Bronx Park means ticks are a year-round concern for homeowners, renters in multi-family buildings, and university housing residents. The neighborhood's mature trees, community gardens, and outdoor recreational areas create perfect conditions for tick populations to establish themselves, making professional tick control essential for safe outdoor enjoyment.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Fordham?
faqs.answer: Fordham's location near major parks, botanical gardens, and wooded areas makes it a high-risk zone for tick exposure. Ticks can transmit serious diseases like Lyme disease, anaplasmosis, and Rocky Mountain spotted fever. Regular tick control protects your family, pets, and visitors from these health risks, especially during peak tick season from April through October.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Fordham?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Fordham range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments, seasonal packages, and year-round protection plans. All services include a free inspection and customized treatment plan tailored to your Fordham property's specific needs.

faqs.question: What does your tick control treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive tick control treatment includes a thorough property inspection, targeted application of EPA-approved tick control products to high-risk areas like lawn perimeters, brush lines, wooded edges, and vegetation. We focus on tick harborage areas while using safe, pet-friendly products. Follow-up treatments are recommended every 4-6 weeks during tick season for optimal protection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide tick control service in Fordham?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Fordham locations. Our team serves the entire Fordham area, including neighborhoods near Fordham University, Arthur Avenue, and Fordham Road. After your free inspection, we can typically begin treatment immediately, with most residential properties completed in 1-2 hours. Results are noticeable within 24-48 hours.
